title: How AI Can Run Your Business While You Sleep: Here Are Some Best Tools For Startups
description: Artificial Intelligence is transforming startups by automating tasks, managing finances, and engaging with customers. In this article, we discover top AI tools like ChatGPT, Jasper AI, QuickBooks, Notion AI, and others that help your business grow efficiently with minimal human effort and without you being required to work on your startup 24/7. , Technology & Science, Times Now
content:

title: Snap climbs 13% as Irenic suggests changes to boost stock's value 7x
description: Irenic Capital suggested shuttering the Specs division and replacing more than a fifth of Snap's workforce with artificial intelligence.
content:
Shares of Snap climbed 13% Tuesday after shareholder Irenic Capital Management sent a letter to CEO Evan Spiegel outlining changes that could increase the stock's value by almost 600%.

title: Oracle cuts thousands of jobs to fund AI pivot
description: The tech giant is restructuring its workforce, while accelerating investments in artificial intelligence. This strategy aims to bolster its cloud growth, despite prevailing market concerns.
content: According to reports from Business Insider, Oracle has begun a wave of layoffs affecting several thousand positions: the exact scale remains unspecified, out of a total headcount of approximately 162,000 employees. This decision comes amid a strategi... [822 chars]

title: Activist investor Irenic swoops in on Snap with new stake, shares surge
description: Activist investor Irenic Capital Management said on Tuesday that technology company Snap could ​be worth at least five times as much as today's valuation but ‌needs to cut costs, optimize its portfolio and use artificial intelligence better.
content: "Snap should be worth a lot more than $7 billion," Irenic portfolio manager Adam Katz wrote to Snap co-founder and Chief Executive Evan ​Spiegel, adding that if the company follows Irenic's blueprint for change, its valuation ​could soar to around $3... [1700 chars]

content:

title: Nokia warns of rising telecom equipment costs, says AI to reshape India network traffic
description: The company said that artificial intelligence has started to reshape telecom traffic patterns, with a sharp rise in uplink demand expected over time—prompting operators in India to start recalibrating their networks despite being at an early stage of readiness.
